rows.query: it was more common among individuals with unperceived hearing loss whose measured hearing loss was mild rather than moderate to profound.
rows.code:
mild = find_col("mild")
mod_profound = find_col("moderate to profound")
uni = find_rows("unilateral or bilateral")
bil = find_rows("unilateral or bilateral > bilateral")

if len(uni) > 0 and len(bil) > 0:
    mild_uni = cell(uni.iloc[0], mild)
    mod_profound_uni = cell(uni.iloc[0], mod_profound)
    mild_bil = cell(bil.iloc[0], mild)
    mod_profound_bil = cell(bil.iloc[0], mod_profound)

    result = "mild" if mild_uni > mod_profound_uni and mild_bil > mod_profound_bil else "moderate to profound"
else:
    raise ValueError("Unilateral or bilateral rows not found uniquely")

print(result)

hhbp_m = find_col("family history", "high blood pressure")

hcevd_m = find_col("family history", "early cardiovascular disease")
ckd_w = find_col("co-morbidity", "chronic kidney disease")
ckd_m = find_col("co-morbidity", "chronic kidney disease")

w_hhbp = cell("women", hhbp_w) > cell("men", hhbp_m)
w_hcevd = cell("women", hcevd_w) > cell("men", hcevd_m)
w_ckd = cell("women", ckd_w) > cell("men", ckd_m)

result = "women" if w_activity and w_hhbp and w_hcevd and w_ckd else "men"
